name: vivace
description: Attribute-driven CSS animation library with a tiny trigger engine — compose animations in HTML with data-viv.
author: Axel RAKOTOARIVAO <axeldiaryrakotoarivao@gmail.com>

scripts.build: bun run build:css && bun run build:js && bun run build:types
scripts.build:css: sass --no-source-map src/styles/vivace.scss dist/vivace.css && sass --no-source-map --style=compressed src/styles/vivace.scss dist/vivace.min.css
scripts.build:js: bun build src/index.ts --outfile dist/index.js --format esm && bun build src/index.ts --outfile dist/index.cjs --format cjs
